mapper.select: SELECT id, reservation_date, time_slot, guide_language, guest_count, customer_name, customer_email, customer_phone, notes, reservation_status, created_at, updated_at FROM public_reservations WHERE reservation_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND guide_language = #{guideLanguage} ORDER BY reservation_date ASC, time_slot ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO public_reservations ( reservation_date, time_slot, guide_language, guest_count, customer_name, customer_email, customer_phone, notes, reservation_status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{reservationDate}, #{timeSlot}, #{guideLanguage}, #{guestCount}, #{customerName}, #{customerEmail}, #{customerPhone}, #{notes}, #{reservationStatus}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
